exercises.code:
cola = ["job1", "job2", "job3"]
while cola:
    job = cola.pop(0)
    print(job)
    if job == "job2":
        print("PAUSE")
        break
print("rest", cola)

exercises.code:
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guard")
    item = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if item == "END":
        break
    out.append(item)
print(out)

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total

print(round(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]), 4))
print(tasa_reject([]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: D1-Skeptic: para S04-T3-A-E2 resolví solo con instruction/hints/tests del slim_packet y exercise_batch, sin mirar correctIndex ni otros attempts. Instrucción: E2 (independiente) — Calcula `tasa_reject = n_reject / n_total` para sts del E1. Luego calcula tasa para lista vacía sin ZeroDivisionError (imprime None).. Hints: if n_total: tasa = n_rej/n_total else None; Primera tasa ~0.333…; segunda None.. Entrega: «def tasa_reject(sts):     n_total = len(sts)     if n_total == 0:         return None     n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")   ».
